doc_title: Kangaroo: Lossless Self-Speculative Decoding via Double Early Exiting

items.evidence_span: Kangaroo achieves speedups up to $1.68 \times$ on Spec-Bench, outperforming Medusa-1 with $88.7 \%$ fewer additional parameters (67M compared to 591M).
Comparison of various self-drafting speculative decoding methods on Spec-Bench [14]
Medusa [17] trains multiple time-independent FFN heads
Lookahead [18] achieves a token acceptance rate comparable to Kangaroo
the adapter network consists of only one multi-head attention [19]
